creator: jannylane313@gmail.com
text:
pHash-openmp.patch

* Remove compiler:openmp from Makefile when OPENMP option is used

Refer to bug #252379. It seems to build correctly without compiler:openmp being supplied, but I am not sure if the pHash port still works at runtime as planned as I no longer use it myself 
https://mapsdriving-directions.io/
